title: Mechanical Design Draft Specifications
contentHtml:
Mechanical Design Draft Specifications

Kindly send the comments/suggestion on the following draft specifications within 20 days from the date of upload at CDEMCFRBL@GMAIL.COM in the following table format.

Clause Number Comments or Suggestions

Draft Specifications:

  1. MMDTS18034, Rev-05: Draft of Technical Specification for PU Based Wet-On-Wet applicable Exterior Painting System for LHB Type coaches (date of uploading-10.04.2024, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
  2. MMDTS18009, Rev-04: Draft of Technical Specification for Thermal cum Sound Insulation material for Roof, Sidewalls and Under-frame of LHB coaches (date of uploading-11.04.2024, comments/suggestions may be send up to 22.04.2025).
  3. MMDTS19041, Rev-03: Draft of Technical Specification for Bio Degradable, Oleophobic & Hydrophobic Organic Surface coating on interior Surface (date of uploading-10.04.2024, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
  4. MMDTS22001 REV.01: Draft of Schedule of Technical Requirements for Anodized Aluminum Braille Stickers for Signage on Railway Coaches (date of uploading-10.04.2025, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
  5. MMDTS19021, Rev-05: Draft of Schedule of Technical Requirements for Fire barrier cloth for Seats and Berths meeting FST(FDire smoke and Toxicity) properties to EN45545 HL3 for Passenger coaches (date of uploading-10.04.2025, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
contentMarkdown:
## Mechanical Design Draft Specifications

Kindly send the comments/suggestion on the following draft specifications within 20 days from the date of upload at [CDEMCFRBL@GMAIL.COM](mailto:CDEMCFRBL@GMAIL.COM) in the following table format.

| Clause Number | Comments or Suggestions |
| --- | --- |
|  |  |

### Draft Specifications:

1. [MMDTS18034, Rev-05](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS%2018034%20rev_05.pdf): Draft of Technical Specification for PU Based Wet-On-Wet applicable Exterior Painting System for LHB Type coaches (date of uploading-10.04.2024, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
2. [MMDTS18009, Rev-04](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/Final%20draft%20MMDTS18009%20Rev_04%20Thermal%20cum%20sound-1%20%26%20reasong%20document.pdf): Draft of Technical Specification for Thermal cum Sound Insulation material for Roof, Sidewalls and Under-frame of LHB coaches (date of uploading-11.04.2024, comments/suggestions may be send up to 22.04.2025)
3. [MMDTS19041, Rev-03](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS%2019041%20REV%2003.pdf): Draft of Technical Specification for Bio Degradable, Oleophobic & Hydrophobic Organic Surface coating on interior Surface (date of uploading-10.04.2024, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
4. [MMDTS22001 REV.01](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS%2022001%20Rev%2001%20with%20reasoned%20doc(1).pdf): Draft of Schedule of Technical Requirements for Anodized Aluminum Braille Stickers for Signage on Railway Coaches (date of uploading-10.04.2025, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
5. [MMDTS19021, Rev-05](https://mcf.indianrailways.gov.in/uploads/MMDTS%2019021.pdf): Draft of Schedule of Technical Requirements for Fire barrier cloth for Seats and Berths meeting FST(FDire smoke and Toxicity) properties to EN45545 HL3 for Passenger coaches (date of uploading-10.04.2025, comments/suggestions may be send up to 21.04.2025)
